description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a prominent hip roof covered in gray shingles. The front features a small covered porch with a black awning, flanked by two large windows and a central entry door. On one side, there is an attached carport with a flat roof, supported by brick columns, and a paved driveway leading up to it. The windows are rectangular and symmetrically arranged, with white frames that contrast against the reddish-brown brick exterior. The house sits on a neatly trimmed green lawn bordered by a low retaining wall. The rear of the house is simpler, with fewer windows and a secondary door providing access to the backyard.
description: A two-story brick house with a hip roof, attached carport, and symmetrical windows, set on a green lawn with a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with a covered porch, two large windows, and the driveway leading to the carport on the right.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the flat-roofed carport and its supporting columns, with the driveway extending alongside the house.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a secondary door, a single large window, and the back section of the carport.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain brick wall, two windows, and a stretch of green lawn.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a small covered porch, black awning, and flanking windows
